data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft's website is backed by Azure cloud services to ensure scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Azure CDN for global content distribution.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The website employs a microservices architecture, allowing different services to scale independently.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using Azure Kubernetes Service for container orchestration.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures optimal viewing and interaction experience across a wide range of devices.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using CSS3 media queries and flexible grid layouts.

data.title: API Integration
data.description: Extensive API integrations are used to fetch dynamic content and services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes REST and GraphQL APIs for data operations.

data.title: Progressive Web App
data.description: PWA features for improved performance and offline capabilities.
data.technical_spec: Service Workers and Web App Manifest for PWA functionality.
